Dialog.name: MSG_START_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}You're slowly catching up to the Shadow! Hang in there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_START_FUKA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5072 0 0}The Shadow is slowing down. Just a little more to go. Don't give up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5128 0 0}It's so fast that I lost its reading... Which way could it have gone...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5089 0 0}I'm sorry, I lost sight of it again... Which way did it go...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_FUKA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}Considering how far we've come, we have to catch up to it! This is the last one![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_YUKARI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}It's definitely this way! Let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_JUNPEI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}Hehe, I totally saw where that shiny, giant thing went.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's this way! Everyone follow me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_SANADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3003 0 0}I could see a glimpse of its shadow from my point of view.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 -1 0 0}It ran off this way. Let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_MITSURU_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}It was faint, but I saw light gleam off of its body.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not completely certain, but it should be this way. Let's hurry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5099 0 0}Koro-chan, you were able to tell which way it went?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Leader, please follow Koro-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_AEGIS_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6064 0 0}I should be able to identify the direction it went based on the location that can be deduced from its footsteps.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am quite certain it went this way. Let us go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_AMADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7008 0 0}I saw a glimpse of it running away from us![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}I'm pretty sure it went that way! Let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BRANCH_ARAGAKI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9005 0 0}I saw where it went from my position.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's this way. We going after it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FAILURE_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 5 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5110 0 0}It's a dead end! It seems we went the wrong way...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}Oh no, the reading is getting farther and farther away... I guess this might be it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TBOX_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5110 0 0}It's a dead end... It seems we went the opposite direction as that Shadow...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}The Shadow's reading is getting further away. It escaped...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}At the very least, we can get this treasure chest it missed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_BATTLE_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}The Shadow's movement has stopped. It seems it's hit a dead end![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Let's hurry! Just keep going straight![n]{f 1 1}
